strengths: Marketing analytics and A/B testing experience
weaknesses: No mention of Sabre or travel industry tools
DBT and Databricks experience not shown
improvement_bullets: Architected production-grade ELT pipelines using Python, SQL, and dbt to model complex datasets into star schemas, ensuring data integrity for financial reporting and loyalty program analysis.
Presented data-driven business cases to senior leadership, effectively translating technical findings into actionable ROI-focused strategies for customer engagement and marketing spend optimization.
Applied statistical rigor to evaluate co-brand marketing tactics and customer personalization initiatives, measuring campaign performance against key loyalty economics metrics.
Integrated diverse data sources—including CRM and partnership datasets—to build comprehensive dashboards in Tableau, facilitating cross-functional alignment on program health metrics.
Collaborated with cross-functional partners in marketing and operations to identify high-value customer segments, focusing on improving lifetime value and loyalty program engagement.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Loyalty Analytics opportunity with JetBlue. I am interested in this opportunity because of JetBlue’s industry-leading commitment to a premium, customer-centric experience, which mirrors my own passion for leveraging data to build long-term brand loyalty. What interests me about working for JetBlue is its reputation for disrupting the travel industry through innovation and its unique, caring culture, which resonates with my background in developing data-driven growth strategies. I believe my expertise in marketing analytics and my proficiency in building robust data pipelines would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw customer data into high-impact business recommendations. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified high-value customer segments using statistical modeling and targeted marketing initiatives, which directly contributed to a 300% increase in revenue within those segments over a 12-month period. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Loyalty Analytics role at JetBlue would allow me to bring my data modeling and dashboarding skills to support the health and growth of the TrueBlue program. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication skills. When tasked with aligning cross-functional teams, I standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, which reduced report discrepancies and ensured a 'single source of truth' for business stakeholders. This improved decision-making speed and fostered better alignment across departments. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my analytical problem-solving skills in working on complex loyalty and co-brand metrics at JetBlue. I know that my technical background in SQL, Python, and Tableau and my passion for loyalty economics align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Analyst, Loyalty Analytics role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
